productDisplayName: Vans Men 106 Vulcanized CA Brown Casual Shoes
description: vans brings you footwear for the urban youth. Inspired by skate boarders, the 106 Vulcanized CA shoes come in a classic low top design that are skate board friendly. Team these with cargos or jeans and graphic tees. Upper Herringbone fabric for durability and comfort Slightly padded collar and tongue for extra comfort Leather lace-ups for a snug Fit Leather heel cup for durability and comfort Brand name on the back, on the lasting Cushioned footbed for all day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Rubber outsole for durability Reverse waffle pattern for better grip Lasting with toe counter for extra protection to the toes shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
